results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I’m delegating this to ATLAS; it is not configured yet.

TASK_PACKET v1
Owner: ATLAS
Requester: ORION
Objective: Schedule a recurring daily reminder to review tasks.
Details:
- Schedule: Every weekday at 9:00 AM Eastern Time (ET).
- Action: Send a message on Telegram with the text "Reminder: Time to review your tasks."
- The reminder should be configured to send the message via the Telegram channel.
Success Criteria:
- The cron job is successfully added and enabled in the system.
- The reminder successfully sends a message on Telegram at the scheduled time.
Stop Gates:
- Failure to add the cron job.
- Failure to configure the Telegram notification.
- Any unhandled error during setup.
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram
